svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="杠杆与支点" id="lever-fulcrum"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-114" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="360" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="GRP_N" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="新人 · 杠杆长,没支点" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="290" width="440" x="30" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="力气小" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="120" x="60" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="AI 杠杆(长)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="140" x="240" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="没有支点
不知道撬哪,空转" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="190" x="130" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NE1" edge="1" parent="1" source="N1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="N2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NE2" edge="1" parent="1" source="N2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;" target="N3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GRP_O" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="老兵 · 杠杆长,支点稳" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="290" width="440" x="510" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="O1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="经验" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="120" x="540" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="O2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="AI 杠杆(长)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="140" x="720" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="O3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="经验当支点
撬动一整条链路" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="190" x="610" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="OE1" edge="1" parent="1" source="O1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="O2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="OE2" edge="1" parent="1" source="O2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="O3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GAP" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="差十年经验" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="80" x="450" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
